(B): Someone can be a man or a woman even if that is different from the sex they were assigned at birth
(C): Refused

answer_options.A: Whether someone is a man or a woman is determined by the sex they were assigned at birth
answer_options.B: Someone can be a man or a woman even if that is different from the sex they were assigned at birth
